identifiers: You can parameterize a column name exactly like a value with a ?
why-parameterize: It automatically deletes any SQL keywords it finds in the input
blocklist: Blocklists are perfectly safe and make parameterized queries unnecessary

layers.Parameterized query: Caps the blast radius of a successful injection
layers.Safe error handling: The only safe way to handle identifiers like a sort column
layers.Allowlist validation: Denies attackers a schema map from leaked error text
